Find a Dog

The dogs below are in Council's care and waiting to be reclaimed by their owner or adopted into a new home.

We also welcome people to apply to be foster carers while these dogs wait to find their new home.

Click on a profile to see more information.

 

Luna

Recently found
American Staffordshire Terrier, female, 2 years old

 

See Luna's profile

Recently found
American Staffordshire Terrier x Pug cross, male, 1 year old
